text: The University of Łódź Press has published this collection as part of the activities related to the "Scientific Excellence as a Key to Excellence in Education" project. The project was financed with the support of the European Social Fund as part of the Knowledge Education Development Operational Program ( Grant No. POWER.03.05.00-00-Z092/17-00).
explanation: The passage resembles formal institutional text with a precise grant reference, a pattern common in human-authored press materials; there are no clear AI-writing artifacts.
